title: 下地あってのネイルっしょ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm waiting for <chrname> to
show up...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that looks really painful! What happened
to your nail, Flash?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It got slightly chipped during gym class. It's
nothing to fuss about.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I dunno, like, you should probably take that more
seriously. Want me to fix it up? I've got my kit
with me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is no time for that. We have less than three
minutes until our run.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And afterwards, we have a joint dance lesson, so I
won't be able to tend to my nails until that is
over.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? Why would you put it off like that? It's
really gonna suck if that nail gets worse.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Will you let me fix your nails if I win
our race?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well... But then if I win, we shall follow our
schedule to a tee.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Nails have power, you know! Better not
take that power lightly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race between Tosen Jordan and Eishin Flash
looks as if it'll go down to the wire.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when Eishin Flash squeezes her fists in
preparation for the final straight...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I-I win.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Flash! Didn't you say "ow" right at the end
of the race?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It appears that I squeezed my fist a little too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seeeee? I told you that you gotta take care of
your nails.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I should've listened. I will prioritize maintaining
them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm glad you got the message! All right, I'll
have you fixed up in juuust a sec!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There. All done! Do you love it or what?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm surprised. Not only do my nails look better...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't hurt at all when I squeeze my fist.
Now I won't have to hold back during my final
spurt.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Riiiiight? I'm, like, literally a pro.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you very much. By the way, what
kind of tools do you—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hey! No peeking! Gotta keep my industry
secrets under wraps!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The nail supplies that Tosen Jordan is trying to
hide come tumbling out.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A manicure set for sports, I see.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Uh, well... Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see. So your nails are not simply for show.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They're part of a secret strategy to maximize
power, since victory is determined by the smallest
of margins.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I planned this or anything... You're,
like, giving me too much credit here...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No. I appreciate you revealing the truth to me
through this experience.
choice_data_list: I guess they're both stylish and handy.
I think it's cool how serious you are about races.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, something like that. I don't mind if you've
got some respect for me now, y'know.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will keep this in mind and repay you one day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! I'm planning to bake some Schneeballen
tomorrow. Please do have some.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, for real? Those sound so chic. I'm totes down!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...It's all about being chic, okay? Don't forget
that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. I'm, like, so tired! Time to go buy some new
nail polish colors!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Both practical and gorgeous... I see. A lesson well
learned.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, chill! It's not like I'm all passion or whatevs,
you know? I just like to do nails...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It smells... It stinks... It reeks... of someone in the
THROES of youth!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, what the... Where'd you come from, Golshi?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, mon ami! Someone's embarrassed! But who's the perp? Is it you?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ew, why are you acting like that? That's low-key
annoying.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The suspect's on the run! Zut alors! But the shrewd
detective Golshi the Great is on the case!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Jordan appears to be troubled by Golshi chasing
her...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Now is my chance to repay that debt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash rescues Tosen Jordan, who comments that "what goes around totes comes around."
